title: Kakenukeru Medley Collaboration Final (FinnOtaku Part)
description:
So, back in 2017, a bunch of Nico Nico Medley arrangers decided to make what I believe is one last tribute to M.Iz's Kakenukeru Medley series. I managed to get in. This is what I made for it and now I can finally share it with the world  :D

I guess this would be the first time since my very first medley released on this channel that I haven't dedicated a medley to YTPMVs or OtoMADs. Most of the visuals are from the collaboration,* but I added some extra visuals on the top. And here's a playlist to show where each of these visuals were taken from:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLuELtZCDdLG1Vi40RHM58zJOrvh69Ade0

*] https://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm35136831 (My part starts around 19:07)
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qRdTjh59JwM&t=2900
